rationale_source: F3.AH × F2.AC cross-family interaction: admin handoff overrides standard collateral-wait; admin route transitions out of awaiting_collateral without collateral_offered

awaiting_collateral_initially_activated.rationale: Event_0 high-LTV (83%) activates F2.AC per R10-C-1.

awaiting_collateral_after_admin_override.rationale: Event_1 admin handoff overrides F2.AC without collateral_offered (admin exception).

workflow_state.rationale: Post-admin-override transitions back to active for standard prelim path.

outbound_emails.phase5_temporal_dependency: fires from event_0; admin override in event_1 may not retract once sent

outbound_emails.rationale: After admin override resolves F2.AC, standard prelim path resumes.
